task: documented translation requirements and multi-agent collaboration protocol
notes: Initial attribution log so future agents can record which changes they intentionally made.

task: updated handoff, README, dictionary, and Google Docs learning references
notes: Added current Codex fulltext workflow, Google Docs sync/import distinction, XBOX/platform dictionary entries, and collaboration pointers.

task: created reusable prompt for onboarding another agent
notes: Prompt tells the new agent what to read and how to process translation queues.

task: documented final-title rule for Codex fulltext translation
notes: Codex must rewrite cn_title, subtitle, and summary during fulltext translation instead of reusing title-summary automation output.

task: documented mandatory exchange-rate refresh for Codex fulltext translation
notes: Codex must refresh or verify multi-source exchange rates before translation batches and run currency normalization before validation.

task: documented XBOX Series platform naming rule
notes: User-facing translations should render Xbox Series X|S / Xbox Series X/S as XBOX Series.

task: added natural-translation rules for Gemini and other models
notes: Added editor-role, anti-English-syntax, title/subtitle/summary, platform naming, and self-check rules to STYLE_PROFILE.md.
Read starter docs and verified repository status with agent_doctor.py

task: translated Onimusha: Way of the Sword release date update article
notes: Completed translation, updated daily index, rebuilt index-list, and ran validations successfully.

task: refactored Google Doc sync script and recovered translations
notes: Split Google Doc sync into safe incremental insert mode and dangerous overwrite rebuild mode. Recovered 9 articles from July 2nd and 1 article from July 3rd.

task: implemented style self-check and local hard-checks validation
